title: orobanche californica subsp. jepsonii
intro: Orobanche californica subsp. jepsonii, also known as Jepson's broomrape, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, classified as a hemiparasitic flowering plant. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jepson's broomrape include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Orobanche californica subsp. jepsonii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
